dashboard.footer_note: © 2026 InvoiceGen. Designed for freelancers and small businesses.

shell.hero_title: Clean billing workflows for freelancers and modern teams.
shell.hero_description: Generate polished invoices and keep your invoice history organized from one focused workspace.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in with your local account to access your workspace.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Start generating invoices and tracking invoice history from one workspace.

forgot_password.title: Reset your password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email address and we will prepare a password reset request.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, invoice preferences, and numbering behavior.
settings.onboarding_subtitle: Complete your company profile before entering the dashboard.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update the core details used for your account.

password.title: Change Password
password.subtitle: Keep your account secure with a fresh password.

company.title: Company
company.subtitle: Configure the company details that appear on invoices.
company.tax_per_item_enabled: Taxes are applied to individual invoice items.
company.tax_per_item_disabled: Taxes are applied to the invoice total.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Define how dates, language, and financial settings are displayed.

customization.title: Customization
customization.subtitle: Define how invoice numbering should look for your account.

tax_types.title: Tax Types
tax_types.subtitle: Create and manage reusable tax rates for invoice creation.
tax_types.modal_subtitle: Configure a reusable tax option for invoices.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Create, preview, update, and manage every invoice from the same workspace.
invoices.create_invoice_subtitle: Build polished invoices with manual line items and live totals.
invoices.edit_invoice_subtitle: Update invoice details, line items, notes, and template settings.
invoices.notes_description: Add rich text notes that appear at the bottom of the invoice.
invoices.template_selector_description: Choose the invoice template your client will see.
invoices.preview_description: Review the invoice facts before saving it.
invoices.invoice_preview_page_subtitle: Open the full invoice page, print it to PDF, or share it with your customer.
invoices.shared_invoice_subtitle: This invoice page is ready to download, print, or review.
invoices.link_copy_unavailable: Copy link is not available in this browser.
invoices.pdf_share_unavailable: Unable to share the invoice PDF on this device.
invoices.pdf_download_unavailable: Unable to generate the invoice PDF right now.
invoices.empty_description: Create your first invoice to start tracking customers, totals, and payment status.
invoices.customer_invoice_information_description: Set the customer details, invoice number, and invoice date.
invoices.saved_item_mode: Select from saved items or add custom lines.
invoices.manual_item_mode: Add manual line items because no saved items are available yet.
invoices.item_tax_notice: Taxes are being applied per item based on your company settings.
invoices.use_typed_item: No saved item matched. The typed text will be used as the item name.
invoices.totals_description: Totals update automatically as items and taxes change.
invoices.manage_invoice: View, edit, clone, or delete this invoice.
invoices.confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?

minimalist.title: Invoice Generator Default
minimalist.description: Simple spacing and clear hierarchy for modern invoices.

corporate.title: Classic & Corporate
corporate.description: A formal structure suited for established businesses.

creative.title: Creative & Artistic
creative.description: A softer presentation with more personality.

vintage.title: Vintage / Old-World
vintage.description: Warm tones and classic contrast for boutique brands.

modern.title: Modern & Tech-Focused
modern.description: A bold, dark-accented layout for digital-first teams.

placeholders.item_search: Search items or type a new name

items.title: Items
items.subtitle: Create reusable catalog items with saved prices, units, and optional tax defaults.
items.name: Name
items.empty_description: Save reusable items here so invoice creation stays fast and consistent.
items.confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

modal_descriptions.create: Add a reusable item with a default price, unit, and optional tax type.
modal_descriptions.edit: Update the saved item details used across future invoices.

validation.price_invalid: Price must be zero or greater.

taxTypes.title: Tax Types
taxTypes.subtitle: Define the tax presets available when creating invoices and reusable items.
